scripts.preflight: npm run doctor && npm run check && npm run security && npm run prepare:deploy
scripts.check: node --check ads-config.js && node --check app.js && node --check feed.js && node --check dm.js && node --check profile.js && node --check settings.js && node --check i18n.js && node --check commentSync.js && node --check profileEditState.js && node --check utils.js && node --check supabaseClient.js && node --check sw.js && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/security-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-deploy.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run security && npm run lint
scripts.lint: eslint ads-config.js app.js commentSync.js dm.js feed.js i18n.js profile.js profileEditState.js settings.js supabaseClient.js sw.js utils.js scripts/*.mjs --ext .js,.mjs
scripts.lint:fix: eslint ads-config.js app.js commentSync.js dm.js feed.js i18n.js profile.js profileEditState.js settings.js supabaseClient.js sw.js utils.js scripts/*.mjs --ext .js,.mjs --fix
